name: PyNet Bridge
description: Official MCP server for RAEN Digital Tools. Connects AI models with Autodesk tools via the PyNet ecosystem.
author: RAEN Digital Tools

tools.name: list_active_instances
tools.description: Scans the system for running Navisworks processes (roamer.exe) and returns the PIDs of all instances that have an active PyNet IPC pipe listener.

tools.name: check_plugin_status
tools.description: Sends a Ping handshake to a specific Navisworks instance (by PID) to verify the PyNet plugin listener is running and responsive.

tools.name: send_command
tools.description: Executes a named Python script directly inside the PyNet engine of a target Navisworks instance. Requires the PID, a script name, and the script content.

tools.name: get_pynet_ui_layout
tools.description: Fetches the complete UI structure of a target instance, returning all ButtonsModules (ribbon tabs) and their associated ScriptButtons.

tools.name: get_buttons_data
tools.description: Lists all ScriptButtons registered under a specific ButtonsModule ID in a target Navisworks instance.

tools.name: get_output_window_status
tools.description: Returns whether the PyNet log/output window is currently available and visible in a target Navisworks instance.

tools.name: create_pynet_module
tools.description: Creates a new custom ButtonsModule (ribbon tab) with the given name in a target Navisworks instance.

tools.name: delete_pynet_module
tools.description: Permanently deletes a ButtonsModule and all its ScriptButtons from a target Navisworks instance by module ID.

tools.name: deploy_script_button
tools.description: Installs a new ScriptButton into a specific ButtonsModule. Accepts name, script path, icon name, and tooltip.

tools.name: update_script_button
tools.description: Updates the metadata (name, script path, icon, tooltip) of an existing ScriptButton and optionally moves it to a different module.

tools.name: delete_script_button
tools.description: Permanently removes a ScriptButton from a ButtonsModule by its ID in a target Navisworks instance.

tools.name: configure_output_window
tools.description: Toggles the visibility of the PyNet log/output window in a target Navisworks instance.
